the official BEAM benchmark on your own hardware. Compare Mnemosyne against published SOTA, test with your preferred LLM, or verify performance before deploying to production."}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39","\n","$L3a","\n","$L3b","\n","$L3c","\n","$L3d","\n","$L3e","\n","$L3f","\n","$L40","\n","$L41","\n","$L42","\n","$L43","\n","$L44","\n","$L45","\n","$L46","\n","$L47","\n","$L48","\n","$L49","\n","$L4a","\n","$L4b","\n","$L4c","\n","$L4d","\n","$L4e","\n","$L4f"],["$L50"],"$L51"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@52"]},null,false,"$@52"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L53",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$54",["$L55"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"avR8AX1ZmJ678HIyJzpPX"}
56:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"OutletBoundary"]
57:"$Sreact.suspense"
5a:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
5c:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What is BEAM?"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"https://huggingface.co/datasets/Mohammadta/BEAM","children":"BEAM"}]," (Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Memory) is the standard benchmark for AI memory systems. It measures how well a memory backend helps an LLM answer questions across 10 abilities:"]}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Ability"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Code"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"What it measures"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Information Extraction"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"IE"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Pulling specific facts from past conversations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Multi-hop Reasoning"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"MR"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Connecting facts across multiple turns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Knowledge Update"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"KU"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Correctly updating facts when new info arrives"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Temporal Reasoning"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"TR"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Reasoning about when things happened"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Abstention"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"ABS"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Knowing when to say \"I don't know\""}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Contradiction Resolution"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"CR"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Handling conflicting information"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Event Ordering"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"EO"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Ordering events chronologically"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Instruction Following"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"IF"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Following user instructions over time"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Preference Following"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"PF"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Remembering user preferences"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Summarization"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"SUM"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Summarizing past conversations"}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["The benchmark ships at four scales: ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"100K"}],", ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"500K"}],", ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"1M"}],", and ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"10M"}]," conversations in the training set. Larger scales stress memory retrieval under heavier data load."]}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10+"}]," with Mnemosyne installed (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"An LLM API key"}]," — OpenRouter or NVIDIA. The benchmark uses an LLM to answer questions and another LLM (or the same one) as a judge"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"The BEAM dataset"}]," — downloaded automatically from HuggingFace on first run"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"~2GB disk"}]," for the 10M dataset"]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"API Key Setup"}]
e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# OpenRouter (recommended)\nexport OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\"sk-or-v1-...\"\n\n# Or NVIDIA API\nexport NVIDIA_API_KEY=\"nvapi-...\"\n"}]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["The benchmark script also checks ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/tmp/openrouter_key.txt"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/tmp/opencode_key.txt"}]," as fallbacks."]}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Start"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Clone the repo and run the evaluation:"}]
12:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"git clone https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Small test run (5 conversations per scale, all scales)\npython tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --sample 5 --scales 100K,500K,1M,10M\n"}]}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["The first run downloads the BEAM dataset from HuggingFace to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.cache/huggingface/"}],". Subsequent runs reuse the cached data."]}]
14:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scales"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--scales"}]," flag controls which dataset sizes to evaluate:"]}]
16:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Just the smallest scale (fastest)\n--scales 100K\n\n# 100K and 1M (most common for comparisons)\n--scales 100K,1M\n\n# All four scales (full SOTA run)\n--scales 100K,500K,1M,10M\n"}]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each conversation in the dataset has up to 50 probing questions. The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--sample"}]," flag sets how many conversations to evaluate per scale:"]}]
18:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# 3 conversations per scale (default, good for development)\n--sample 3\n\n# 10 conversations per scale (better statistical significance)\n--sample 10\n\n# All conversations (0 = evaluate everything)\n--sample 0\n"}]}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":["Tip: Start with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--sample 3 --scales 100K"}]," to verify your setup. Scale up once everything runs cleanly."]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Models"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["By default the benchmark uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"DeepSeek V4 Pro"}]," via OpenRouter. You can change the model:"]}]
1c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Use any OpenRouter model\npython tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --model \"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4\" --sample 3\n\n# Use NVIDIA models\npython tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --model \"meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct\" --sample 3\n"}]}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"The judge model (which scores the answers) defaults to the same model. For cost savings, use a cheaper model for judging:"}]
1e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py \\\n  --model \"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4\" \\\n  --judge-model \"deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash\" \\\n  --sample 3\n"}]}]
1f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Modes"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":"Two evaluation modes:"}]
21:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"End-to-end"}]," (default): Full pipeline. Ingests conversations into Mnemosyne, retrieves memories, has the LLM answer questions, then another LLM judges the answers. This measures the complete memory + LLM system."]}]
22:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --mode end_to_end --sample 3\n"}]}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval-only"}],": Skips the LLM answering step. Only measures how well Mnemosyne retrieves relevant memories for each question. Useful for isolating retrieval quality from LLM quality."]}]
24:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --mode retrieval --sample 3\n"}]}]
25:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Resuming Interrupted Runs"}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":["Long benchmark runs can be interrupted. Use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--resume"}]," to pick up where you left off:"]}]
27:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --scales 100K,1M --sample 10 --resume\n"}]}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":["Results are saved incrementally to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"results/beam_e2e_results.json"}],". The resume flag skips any question that already has a score in that file."]}]
29:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Interpreting Results"}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Results are saved to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"results/beam_e2e_results.json"}],". The summary includes:"]}]
2b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Per-ability scores"}]," (IE, MR, KU, TR, etc.) — percentage of questions answered correctly"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Per-scale overall score"}]," — average across all abilities for that scale"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Paired outcomes"}]," in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"results/paired_outcomes.jsonl"}]," — detailed question-by-question breakdowns"]}],"\n"]}]
2c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Example output:"}]
2d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-json","children":"{\n  \"scale\": \"100K\",\n  \"overall\": 65.2,\n  \"abilities\": {\n    \"IE\": 91.5,\n    \"MR\": 87.5,\n    \"KU\": 50.0,\n    \"TR\": 75.0,\n    \"ABS\": 100.0,\n    \"CR\": 50.0,\n    \"EO\": 25.0,\n    \"IF\": 62.5,\n    \"PF\": 54.5,\n    \"SUM\": 55.6\n  }\n}\n"}]}]
2e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"BEAM Benchmark Results (v3.0.0)"}]
2f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3.0.0 was evaluated on the official BEAM benchmark using our MEMORIA Fact Engine. All results are fully reproducible."}]
30:["$","p",null,{"children":"Important notes:"}]
31:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Our run uses Llama 3.3 70B (system model) + DeepSeek V4 Flash (judge)."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Most public leaderboards (including Hindsight's) use Llama-4-Maverick as judge. Scores are not directly comparable across different judges — we disclose this transparently."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"We have published results for the 100K scale only. We have not yet published 10M-scale numbers."}],"\n"]}]
32:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h4","children":"Official Results (100K scale)"}]
33:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"System"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Score"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Notes"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Hindsight"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"73.4%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Llama-4-Maverick (published Apr 2026)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Mnemosyne v3.0.0"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"65.2%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Llama 3.3 70B + DeepSeek judge"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Honcho"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"63.0%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Published Dec 2025"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"LIGHT (baseline)"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"35.8%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"BEAM paper"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"RAG (baseline)"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"32.3%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"BEAM paper"}]]}]]}]]}]
34:["$","p",null,{"children":"Per-ability breakdown (100K):\nIE 91.5% · MR 87.5% · TR 75.0% · ABS 100.0% · CR 50.0% · KU 50.0% · EO 25.0% · IF 62.5% · PF 54.5% · SUM 55.6%"}]
35:["$","p",null,{"children":"Biggest gains from v2.5: multi-hop reasoning (+70.8pp), temporal reasoning (+45.8pp), knowledge update (+33.3pp)."}]
36:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h4","children":"Full Published Leaderboard (all scales — Hindsight Apr 2026)"}]
37:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Tier"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Hindsight"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"Honcho"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"LIGHT"}],["$","th",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"RAG"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"100K"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"73.4%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"63.0%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"35.8%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"32.3%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"500K"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"71.1%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"64.9%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"35.9%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"33.0%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"1M"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"73.9%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"63.1%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"33.6%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"30.7%"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"10M"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"64.1%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"40.6%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"26.6%"}],["$","td",null,{"style":{"textAlign":"left"},"children":"24.9%"}]]}]]}]]}]
38:["$","p",null,{"children":"Our status: Competitive at 100K scale in a local-first setup. We are actively working on 10M-scale results and will publish them here as soon as they are ready."}]
39:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h4","children":"Reproduce Our Exact 100K Result"}]
3a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py \\\n  --model \"meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct\" \\\n  --judge-model \"deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash\" \\\n  --scales 100K \\\n  --sample 0\n"}]}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Note: Your scores will vary based on hardware, LLM provider, and model. The benchmark is designed to be reproducible — same dataset, same questions, same scoring rubric."}]
3c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Running on Your Own Hardware"}]
3d:["$","p",null,{"children":"The benchmark doesn't need a GPU. The LLM calls go through the API. Mnemosyne runs locally, so:"}]
3e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Disk I/O matters"}]," — SSD recommended for larger scales"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"RAM"}]," — ~2GB for the 10M dataset, otherwise minimal"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"CPU"}]," — embedding operations use CPU by default. More cores = faster ingestion"]}],"\n"]}]
3f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Reproducing Published Results"}]
40:["$","p",null,{"children":"To reproduce the v3.0.0 published scores:"}]
41:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"git clone https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\npip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\nexport OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\"your-key\"\npython tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py \\\n  --model \"meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct\" \\\n  --judge-model \"deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash\" \\\n  --scales 100K \\\n  --sample 0\n"}]}]
42:["$","p",null,{"children":["This reproduces our exact published 100K result. For multi-scale runs, add additional scales: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--scales 100K,1M,10M"}],"."]}]
43:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Pure Recall Mode"}]
44:["$","p",null,{"children":["For measuring just the memory retrieval (not the LLM's answering ability), use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--pure-recall"}],":"]}]
45:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"python tools/evaluate_beam_end_to_end.py --pure-recall --sample 5 --scales 100K\n"}]}]
46:["$","p",null,{"children":"This disables the LLM answer step and scores purely on whether the correct facts were retrieved."}]
47:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Contributing Results"}]
48:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you run benchmarks with different models or hardware, we'd love to see the results. Open an issue or PR with:"}]
49:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"results/beam_e2e_results.json"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"The command you used"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Your hardware specs (CPU, RAM, disk type)"}],"\n"]}]
4a:["$","p",null,{"children":"This helps the community understand real-world performance across different setups."}]
4b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Troubleshooting"}]
4c:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Dataset download fails"}],": Make sure you have internet access and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"huggingface_hub"}]," installed (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install huggingface_hub"}],")."]}]
4d:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API key not found"}],": The script checks ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OPENROUTER_API_KEY"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NVIDIA_API_KEY"}]," env vars, plus ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/tmp/openrouter_key.txt"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/tmp/opencode_key.txt"}],". Set one of these."]}]
4e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Out of memory"}],": Use smaller scales (",["$","code",null,{"children":"--scales 100K"}],") and fewer samples (",["$","code",null,{"children":"--sample 3"}],"). The 10M dataset is ~2GB."]}]
4f:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Slow runs"}],": Embedding is CPU-bound. Install ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," for faster vector generation. Use fewer samples while tuning."]}]
